IICO(E).вҖ” Whereas sub-scction 0 ) o f section 4 of tlie Prasar Bharati (Broadcasting Corporation o f India) Act, 1990 (25 o f 1990) (liercinafter rcfcired to as tlie said Act) requires tliat the Ch:iinntui aiid tlie other Members, cxccpi the ex-officio Members, tlie Nominated Members and tlie electcd Members shall be appointed by tlie President of India on the recom m eiidatiou of a committee consisting of the Members specified in that sub-section: And whereas tlie President, in exercise of tlie powers conferred by sub-section (1), read witli snb-section (4) o f section 4 o f the said A ct and on tlie recommendation o f the committee, appinted tlie following persons on tlie Prasar Bharati Botrrd for a period o f six years with cffect from (he dates they assmne charge, nam ely;вҖ” 1 Shri Nikliil C hakravarty ................................................ вҖ” Chainnan 2. And whereas snb-section (5) o f section 6 of the said Act provides that as soon as may be aflcr the establishment o f tlie Coiporation, the President of India may, by oi dcr, make such pro^'isions as lie tliniks fit for curtailing tlie term of office o f some of the Part-lime Members Uien appointed ir order llial one-lliird of Uie M embers holding office as such Part-tim e Members shall retire every second yeai tliereafter; And whereas tlic President, by notificalion No. S.O. 210(E), dated tlie 1st April, 1999, made the PnisarBhtirati (Curtailment of Term o f Office of Pait- tim e Members) Order, 1999 (hereinafter referred to as tlie said Order); And whereas the President is of tlie opinion that curtailment of the tenn of office of Pari-timc Members under sub-section (5) of section 6 o f the said Act should be based on cxpcricncc. expertise and background of the members and tlie contribudon to the effective and harmonious working of die Board; Now, therefore, in exercise c f the powers conftrred by snb-section ( ^), read witli sub-section (5) of seclion 6 of the said A ct and in supersession of tlie said Order, (lie President, aflcrtaking into, consideration.вҖ” (a) the experience, expertise and background of the McTiibcrs; (b) their contribution to the effective and liannonions working of the Board, ' (c) relative indispensability of Part-time Members at Ihe present stage and the necessity of taking the benefit - of th en sf^rviccs by tJieir retention for a further period of time; and (d) all other relevant circumstances, hereby m akes tlic following order for curtailing die lemi of office o f tlie above Part-time M embers tlien appointed in order that one-thi:d o f die Members holding office as such Part-time Members shall retire in evci"y sccond year thereafter in tlie mamier specified in the Table below ;вҖ” SI.
